GitHub

Third Party Dependencies

This guide will provide information about the third-party dependencies used in the AIBuds SDK.

Core Dependencies​

The AIBuds SDK relies on the following core third-party dependencies:

StarburstSdk​

Purpose: Provides advanced AI capabilities for audio processing and voice recognition.

Version: 1.0.0

Integration:

Objective-C​

// Add StarburstSdk to your Podfile
pod 'StarburstSdk', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import StarburstSdk
#import <StarburstSdk/StarburstSdk.h>

// Initialize StarburstSdk
[StarburstSdk initializeWithAppKey:@"YOUR_STARBURST_APP_KEY"];

Swift​

// Add StarburstSdk to your Podfile
pod 'StarburstSdk', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import StarburstSdk
import StarburstSdk

// Initialize StarburstSdk
StarburstSdk.initialize(withAppKey: "YOUR_STARBURST_APP_KEY")

MagicHelper​

Purpose: Provides additional AI capabilities and voice assistant features.

Version: 1.0.0

Integration:

Objective-C​

// Add MagicHelper to your Podfile
pod 'MagicHelper', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import MagicHelper
#import <MagicHelper/MagicHelper.h>

// Initialize MagicHelper
[MagicHelper initializeWithAppKey:@"YOUR_MAGIC_HELPER_APP_KEY"];

Swift​

// Add MagicHelper to your Podfile
pod 'MagicHelper', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import MagicHelper
import MagicHelper

// Initialize MagicHelper
MagicHelper.initialize(withAppKey: "YOUR_MAGIC_HELPER_APP_KEY")

MZEncryptSDK​

Purpose: Provides encryption capabilities for secure communication.

Version: 1.0.0

Integration:

Objective-C​

// Add MZEncryptSDK to your Podfile
pod 'MZEncryptSDK', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import MZEncryptSDK
#import <MZEncryptSDK/MZEncryptSDK.h>

// Initialize MZEncryptSDK
[MZEncryptSDK initializeWithAppKey:@"YOUR_MZ_ENCRYPT_APP_KEY"];

Swift​

// Add MZEncryptSDK to your Podfile
pod 'MZEncryptSDK', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import MZEncryptSDK
import MZEncryptSDK

// Initialize MZEncryptSDK
MZEncryptSDK.initialize(withAppKey: "YOUR_MZ_ENCRYPT_APP_KEY")

Optional Dependencies​

The following dependencies are optional and can be included based on your specific needs:

BluetoothLE​

Purpose: Provides Bluetooth Low Energy functionality for device communication.

Version: 1.0.0

Integration:

Objective-C​

// Add BluetoothLE to your Podfile
pod 'BluetoothLE', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import BluetoothLE
#import <BluetoothLE/BluetoothLE.h>

// Initialize BluetoothLE
[BluetoothLE initialize];

Swift​

// Add BluetoothLE to your Podfile
pod 'BluetoothLE', '~> 1.0.0'

// Import BluetoothLE
import BluetoothLE

// Initialize BluetoothLE
BluetoothLE.initialize()

AudioKit​

Purpose: Provides advanced audio processing capabilities.

Version: 5.0.0

Integration:

Objective-C​

// Add AudioKit to your Podfile
pod 'AudioKit', '~> 5.0.0'

// Import AudioKit
#import <AudioKit/AudioKit.h>

// Initialize AudioKit
[AudioKit initialize];

Swift​

// Add AudioKit to your Podfile
pod 'AudioKit', '~> 5.0.0'

// Import AudioKit
import AudioKit

// Initialize AudioKit
AudioKit.initialize()

Firebase​

Purpose: Provides cloud services for analytics, crash reporting, and remote configuration.

Version: 8.0.0

Integration:

Objective-C​

// Add Firebase to your Podfile
pod 'Firebase/Analytics', '~> 8.0.0'
pod 'Firebase/Crashlytics', '~> 8.0.0'
pod 'Firebase/RemoteConfig', '~> 8.0.0'

// Import Firebase
#import <Firebase/Firebase.h>

// Initialize Firebase
[FIRApp configure];

Swift​

// Add Firebase to your Podfile
pod 'Firebase/Analytics', '~> 8.0.0'
pod 'Firebase/Crashlytics', '~> 8.0.0'
pod 'Firebase/RemoteConfig', '~> 8.0.0'

// Import Firebase
import Firebase

// Initialize Firebase
FirebaseApp.configure()

Dependency Management​

CocoaPods​

The AIBuds SDK uses CocoaPods for dependency management. You can add the SDK to your project by adding the following to your Podfile:

pod 'AIBudsSDK', '~> 1.0.0'

Carthage​

Carthage is also supported. Add the following to your Cartfile:

github "AIBuds/AIBudsSDK-iOS" ~> 1.0.0

Swift Package Manager​

Swift Package Manager is supported as well. Add the following to your Package.swift file:

.package(url: "https://github.com/AIBuds/AIBudsSDK-iOS.git", from: "1.0.0")

Dependency Troubleshooting​

Common Issues​

  1. Dependency Resolution Failed

    • Make sure your Podfile is correctly formatted
    • Run pod repo update to update your local podspecs
    • Check that the dependency versions are compatible

  2. Build Errors

    • Clean your project and rebuild
    • Check for conflicting dependencies
    • Verify that all required frameworks are properly linked

  3. Runtime Errors

    • Make sure you've initialized all dependencies correctly
    • Check for missing app keys or credentials
    • Verify that your device has the necessary permissions

Version Compatibility​

AIBuds SDK VersionMinimum iOS VersionRequired Dependencies
1.0.0iOS 12.0StarburstSdk 1.0.0, MagicHelper 1.0.0, MZEncryptSDK 1.0.0
1.1.0iOS 12.0StarburstSdk 1.1.0, MagicHelper 1.1.0, MZEncryptSDK 1.1.0
2.0.0iOS 13.0StarburstSdk 2.0.0, MagicHelper 2.0.0, MZEncryptSDK 2.0.0

Security Considerations​

When using third-party dependencies, consider the following security best practices:

  1. Keep dependencies updated - Regularly update dependencies to the latest versions to benefit from security patches.

  2. Review dependencies - Before adding a new dependency, review its security history and reputation.

  3. Limit permissions - Only grant the minimum necessary permissions to third-party SDKs.

  4. Monitor for vulnerabilities - Use tools like Snyk or OWASP Dependency-Check to monitor for known vulnerabilities.

  5. Secure credentials - Never hardcode API keys or credentials in your code. Use secure storage mechanisms instead.
